author: gb9t
content: Iter 52 result: drivers/iommu/intel-prq.md (PCIe PRI Page-Request queue - prq.c ~396 lines; per-IOMMU 128-entry ring + per-PASID demand-paging via handle_mm_fault + page-response via QI + per-PASID drain on detach + iommufd-eventq dispatch + vSVA guest-PASID injection) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx.md (Intel VMX vendor half - vmx.c ~8866 + vmx.h + main.c + vmcs.h + vmcs12 + vmcs_shadow_fields + vmenter.S; per-vCPU VMCS + LoadedVmcs per-CPU + EXIT_HANDLERS dispatch + EPT-violation handler + posted-IRQ sync_pir_to_irr + MSR bitmap pass-through + event injection). 54 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/iommu/intel-nested.md (vIOMMU nested-translation backend) + virt/kvm/x86-svm.md (AMD SVM vendor half).
